description: Style Note shorts are quite the rage this season and femella gives you the finest. You can pair them with basic tank tops and flip flops. Accessorise with chunky jewellery for a bohemian look. Product Details Sea blue shorts, has two insert pockets in front, a buttoned and zippered closure, belt loops at the waistband, inverted V pleat below the waist band on either side in front, two insert pockets at the back and fold over hemline Material and Care Blended fabric Cold wash with like colours Do not bleach or wring Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size M
